## Checklist

- [ ] `make check` passes (headers in sync with Go constants)
- [ ] `go test ./...` passes
- [ ] `go vet ./...` passes
- [ ] Versioning table in `README.md` updated (if constants changed)
- [ ] Go source and `c/` files committed together in one commit
